title: Senescence Inhibition and Respiration
author_string: Dedolph, R. R., Wittwer, S. H., Tuli, V.
publisher: American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS)
abstract:
Freshly harvested asparagus spears treated with N
            6
            -benzyladenine and then held in the dark at 21°C for 136 hours showed a lower respiration rate, as measured by CO
            2
            evolution, than nontreated spears. Associated with the lower respiration rate were proportional decreases in postharvest spear elongation and weight loss through desiccation.
